description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential structure set on a large green plot, featuring a rectangular main building with a flat roof. The front facade includes a main entrance and several windows, with a small set of steps leading up to the door. The interior is visible and contains a spacious open-plan area with multiple tables and chairs, suggesting a communal or dining space. Outside, there is a small playground or recreational area with equipment and several figures, indicating a family-friendly environment. The building is constructed primarily from light-colored materials, likely concrete or plaster, with glass windows and wooden or metal furnishings inside. The overall design is modern and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on open, accessible spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and an open-plan interior, set on a green plot with a playground and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, windows, and the playground area in the foreground.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open-plan interior with tables and chairs, and the playground area now in the background.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the building, the arrangement of interior furnishings, and the open green space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the playground equipment and the side of the bungalow.
